specific_question: By November 30, 2025, how many production lines at Elexion Automotive will be integrated with digital twin-enabled energy efficiency monitoring?
answer: According to an internal planning report dated September 5, 2025, Elexion Automotive plans to integrate digital twin-enabled energy efficiency monitoring on 14 production lines across select facilities by October 5, 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
